Recruiter Walkthrough
Recruiter Guide

Recruiter Walkthrough

From sign-in to a finished, branded submittal — the everyday Cursus Pro flow, one screen at a time.

BJ Layher · Layher Studios · layher.studios@gmail.com
01Sign in 02Start a résumé and add documents 03Review the profile 04Complete the assignment history 05Send a reference request 06What the reference sees 07Brand it and download
01

Sign in

Open Cursus Pro and choose Sign in with Microsoft. Access is limited to your company's Microsoft accounts, so there's no separate password to create or remember — your administrator controls who gets in.

02

Start a résumé and add documents

Click New Resume, pick the candidate's modality (for example, Registered Nurse), then drag in whatever the candidate sent — a PDF, a Word file, or even phone photos of a paper résumé. Add any notes that should take priority over the documents, then press Parse & Merge.

TipThe notes box is authoritative — anything you type there overrides what the documents say (handy for a corrected start date or agency name).
03

Review the profile

In seconds, Cursus Pro fills in a complete, structured profile. Step through the tabs to confirm the details — name and credentials, contact information, licenses and certifications, and the professional summary. Everything is editable.

04

Complete the assignment history

The Work History tab lists each assignment, most recent first. Press Research all facilities to auto-fill bed size, trauma level, teaching status, and EMR system for every facility, and Check Work Gaps to flag any unexplained time between assignments.

05

Send a reference request

On the References tab, press Copy reference link to generate a secure, single-use link, then email it to the candidate's past manager. No phone tag, no forms to transcribe.

06

What the reference sees

The reference opens the link to a clean, agency-branded form, rates the traveler across the categories that matter, and submits. The result writes straight back onto the candidate's profile. The link is single-use and expires automatically — no login or attachments required.

07

Brand it and download

Open Preview & Download to see the finished résumé exactly as it will export. Choose a template and your agency brand kit, then download a polished PDF or an editable Word file — or grab the full submittal packet, references included, as a single zip.

You're ready to submit

A complete candidate — parsed, reviewed, referenced, branded, and exported — in a fraction of the time manual formatting takes.
